title: The Death of Muhammad b. Sulayman and the Confiscation of His Fortune
description: and the Confiscation of His Fortune Among the events taking place during this year was the death of Muhammad b. Sulayman4m at al-Bagrah a few nights before the end of Jumada II (mid-November 789). It has been mentioned that when Muhammad b. Sulaymin died, al-Rashid despatched an agent for every category of what Muhammad b. Sulaymin had left behind, ordering him to select the best items from it.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
